sections.paragraph:
(id.), [Michaiah], pr.n.-

(1) of a captain of King Jehoshaphat, 2Ch 17:7.-(2) the wife of Rehoboam, the daughter of Uriel, 2Ch 13:2 compare however 2Ch 11:21, 22 2Ch 11:22 1Ki 15:2, in which passages this wife of Rehoboam, the mother of Abijah, is called Maachah (מַעֲכָה) the daughter of Absalom.
